content.problemStatement:
There is an array AAA with integer elements of size nnn. We create another array BBB where

BiB_{i}Bi‚Äč = ‚ąĎj=1iAj\sum_{j = 1}^{i}A_j‚ąĎj=1i‚ÄčAj‚Äč - max{A1,A2,....,Ai}max\{A_1, A_2,...., A_i\}max{A1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,....,Ai‚Äč}

You are given this array BBB and asked to find any valid array AAA.

**Note**: For a given array BBB solution always exists.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains an integer NNN.
The second line of each test case contains NNN space-separated integers B1,B2,‚Ä¶,BNB_1, B_2, \ldots, B_NB1‚Äč,B2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,BN‚Äč ‚ÄĒ the elements of array BBB.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč ‚ÄĒ the elements of array AAA.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 10610^6106.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
For testcase 1:
Let AAA = [3,‚ąí2,4][3, -2, 4][3,‚ąí2,4]
B1B_1B1‚Äč = A1A_1A1‚Äč - A1A_1A1‚Äč = 000
B2B_2B2‚Äč = A1A_1A1‚Äč + A2A_2A2‚Äč - max\text{max}max(A1A_1A1‚Äč, A2A_2A2‚Äč) = 111 - 333 = -222
B3B_3B3‚Äč = A1A_1A1‚Äč + A2A_2A2‚Äč + A3A_3A3‚Äč - max\text{max}max(A1A_1A1‚Äč, A2A_2A2‚Äč, A3A_3A3‚Äč) = 555 - 444 = 111
